50.$description: Lightest yellow — subtle tints and hover backgrounds.

700.$description: Dark amber (#b86819). Part of yellow scale. Same hex as orange/600 — intentional: amber sits at intersection of yellow and orange families.

white.$description: Pure white (#ffffff). Use for backgrounds, card surfaces.

black.$description: Pure brand black (#1a1a1a). Intentionally same value as neutral/900. Use color/base/black for absolute black references, neutral/900 for dark text/bg scale steps.

400.$description: Coral red (#ff7272). Error and ranking accent.

promo-green.$description: Light green — lab tests, health promos. #edffc6

promo-blue.$description: Light blue — flu vaccine, health promos. #d7fbff

promo-teal.$description: Very light teal — service tile card backgrounds. #f4feff

promo-dark-teal.$description: Dark teal #134453. Health/wellness promo card text.

campaign-pink.$description: Campaign pink #e84fcf. Beauty and seasonal campaigns.

600.$description: Dark orange (#b86819). Part of orange scale. Same hex as yellow/700 — intentional: this shade is shared between families.

500.$description: Mid grey (#7e8080). Secondary text and icons.

750.$description: Neutral gray #3a3a3a. Between neutral/700 (#4d4d4d) and neutral/800 (#232424).

900.$description: Darkest neutral in the scale (#1a1a1a). Same value as color/base/black. Use in neutral ramp contexts (text, bg scales).

focus-primary.$description: Focus halo for Primary buttons. Preserves current hardcoded value.

avatar-disabled.$description: White 60% overlay (#FFFFFF99) — equals opacity/60. Alpha cannot reference opacity tokens in Figma; keep in sync manually.

tier-green.$description: Professional Incentives — green tier background (aliases color/green/50)
